---
title: "Photos"
format: html
---

Absolutely mediocre photographer: here are some of the places I've been recently!

# Pismo Beach
A few pictures from my trip to Pismo. This was a wonderful trip despite the cold!

::: {layout-ncol=3}
![](media/pismo-flower.JPG){group="pismo" width="400"}

![](media/pismo-surf.JPG){group="pismo" width="400"}

![](media/pismo-dramatic.JPG){group="pismo" width="400"}
:::

# Joshua Tree
Jumping around Jtree? First climbing team trip was amazing...bishop next?

::: {layout-ncol=3}
![](media/far-away.JPG){group="treej" width="400"}

![](media/big rock.JPG){group="treej" width="400"}

![](media/treej.JPG){group="treej" width="400"}
:::
